D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

Bilateral Filter — Smoothing That Preserves Edges

Spatial Gaussian × intensity Gaussian: average only over neighbours close in space AND in value; the foundation of HDR tone-mapping and skin-smoothing pipelines

A linear Gaussian blurs through edges; bilateral lets you blur within a region but stops at sharp transitions. σ_s = spatial radius (how far to look); σ_r = intensity tolerance (how different in value to still include). Edge-aware filters power Apple's deep-fusion sharpening and Lightroom's Clarity slider.

σ_s controls spatial reach; σ_r controls "how big a value difference counts as an edge".
